about.bio: Automation and reliability-focused engineer with 13+ years at Bloomberg. Experience across release engineering, technical leadership, and workflow optimization. Built Python-based automation that reduced manual effort, improved release quality, and scaled operational processes across teams.

experience.title: Triage Engineer
responsibilities: Managed release lifecycle for internal and client-facing software, supporting thousands of users while minimizing production risk
Reduced manual operational workload by 60%+ through Python automation of recurring release and validation tasks
Automated monthly security patch ingestion, eliminating 100% of manual download effort and ensuring consistent on-time validation
Developed JIRA automation workflows, reducing ticket creation time from minutes to seconds and improving release tracking consistency
Built internal tooling to generate 200+ release calendar events in a single execution, saving several hours per release cycle
Eliminated biweekly manual coordination task by implementing automated release cutoff notifications, improving cross-team alignment
Participated in Microsoft Security Update Validation Program, helping prevent release conflicts and production incidents
Improved release reliability by identifying and blocking faulty builds before wider deployment
Accelerated development velocity by leveraging AI-assisted tools for scripting, debugging, and workflow design

experience.title: Technical Support Specialist Team Leader
responsibilities: Managed and developed a team of 8-12 engineers, improving performance across productivity and quality metrics
Increased team productivity and issue resolution efficiency through targeted coaching and structured feedback
Led hiring efforts, interviewing and onboarding candidates contributing to team growth and performance stability
Reduced recurring issue handling time by creating structured training and documentation for complex troubleshooting scenarios
Developed dashboards and reporting tools to track KPIs, enabling data-driven performance management
Handled performance management cases, successfully improving underperforming team members and maintaining team standards
Strengthened cross-team collaboration, improving response times and issue resolution across departments

experience.title: Global Technical Support Team Leader
responsibilities: Led technical support operations for high-priority client issues, ensuring timely resolution and client satisfaction
Acted as escalation point for complex incidents, reducing resolution time for critical issues
Improved operational efficiency by refining support workflows and escalation processes

experience.title: Global Technical Support Backup Team Leader
responsibilities: Served as escalation point for high-impact technical issues, supporting both internal teams and external clients
Delivered technical training sessions to 30-40 client IT professionals per session, improving self-service troubleshooting capabilities
Reduced inbound support dependency by enabling client-side IT teams through structured training programs
Supported regional expansion through hiring and onboarding initiatives

experience.title: Global Technical Support Representative
responsibilities: Handled high-volume technical support across phone, chat, and email, often managing multiple concurrent issues
Provided bilingual support (English and Portuguese) to a global client base
Troubleshot networking issues using diagnostic tools such as ping and traceroute
Coordinated with telecom providers to resolve connectivity outages impacting client operations
Promoted to leadership role within 6 months based on performance and technical capability

experience.title: Information Systems Intern
responsibilities: Provided IT support for internal employees, resolving hardware and software issues
Configured and deployed loaner devices, ensuring operational readiness for client-facing teams
Supported onboarding logistics including device setup and phone system configuration

workflow: Workflow automation and process optimization using Python.
Release lifecycle management, validation, and change management.
Observability and monitoring with Grafana and Splunk.
AI-assisted development with GitHub Copilot and Claude Code.

interests.summary: I love learning new things, admittedly I sometimes go too deep down the Reddit rabbit hole. I am a Lego connoisseur, Formula 1 aficionado, and in my spare time I enjoy watching movies and television shows.
interests.details: I am always looking for ways to enhance my work and side projects. I achieve that by either reinventing workflows to make them simpler, or by looking into new technologies to apply to my day-to-day life.
interests.hobbies: When forced outdoors, I will relocate to another indoor facility to play squash.
